tool.name: RNAcofold
tool.description: Calculate secondary structures of two RNAs with dimerization
tool.command: RNAcofold < '$input' > '$tabularFile' -T$model_options.temperature -d$model_options.dangling $general_options.noPS $general_options.noconversion $IDs.auto_id #if str($IDs.id_prefix) != "alignment" --id-prefix='$IDs.id_prefix' #end if #if $IDs.id_digits != 4 --id-digits=$IDs.id_digits #end if #if $IDs.id_start != 1 --id-start=$IDs.id_start #end if #if str($constraints.constraintLocation.constraintSelector) == "fromFile" --constraint='$constraints.constraintLocation.constraintsFile' $constraints.constraintLocation.canonicalBPonly $constraints.constraintLocation.enforceConstraint #end if #if str($constraints.constraintLocation.constraintSelector) == "inFile" -C #end if $algorithm_options.allpf #if len($algorithm_options.concfiles) == 1 #for $i in $algorithm_options.concfiles --concfile='$i.concfile' #end for #end if #if $algorithm_options.pf != "-1" --partfunc=$algorithm_options.pf #end if #if $algorithm_options.pfScale != 1.07 --pfScale=$algorithm_options.pfScale #end if #if $algorithm_options.bppmThreshold != 1e-5 --bppmThreshold=$algorithm_options.bppmThreshold #end if $algorithm_options.gquad $model_options.notetra $model_options.nolp $model_options.nogu $model_options.noclosinggu #if $model_options.nsp --nsp='$model_options.nsp' #end if #if $model_options.betaScale != 1.0 --betaScale=$model_options.betaScale #end if

param.name: auto_id
param.label: Automatically generate an ID for each sequence.
param.help: If active, RNAcofold ignores any IDs retrieved from the input and automatically generates an ID for each sequence.

param.name: id_prefix
param.label: Prefix for automatically generated IDs (as used in output file names)

param.name: id_digits
param.label: Number of digits in automatically generated sequence IDs

param.name: id_start
param.label: First number in automatically generated sequence IDs

param.name: dangling
param.label: How to treat dangling end energies
param.option: 1: only unpaired bases can participate in at most one dangling end
2: unpaired bases participate in all dangling ends
3: allow coaxial stacking of adjacent helices in multi-loops

param.name: noclosinggu
param.label: Allow GU pairing at the ends

param.name: notetra
param.label: Allow stabilization for loops, hairpins etc.

param.name: nsp
param.label: Allow non-standard pairs in addition to AU, GC, and GU pairs.
param.help: Comma-separated list of additionally allowed pairs, e.g. GA.

param.name: constraintSelector
param.label: Constraints
param.option: The constraints are in a separate file
The constraints are in the FASTA input file

param.label: Remove non-canonical base pairs from the structure constraint
Enforce base pairs given by round brackets () in structure constraint

param.name: pf
param.label: Calculate partition function
param.help: Calculate the partition function and base pairing probability matrix in addition to the mfe structure.
param.option: 0: Deactivates calculation of pair probabilities (saves ~50% runtime)
1: Calculate the partition function and base pairing probability matrix

param.name: allpf
param.label: Calculate homo-dimers as well as A and B monomers
Concentrations
param.help: Read initial monomer concentrations and compute expected equilibrium concentrations of the 5 possible species (AB, AA, BB, A, B).

repeat.name: concfiles
repeat.title: Concentrations file
repeat.help: Table of initial concentrations for the two sequences. This option toggles -c and --all_pf automatically.

param.label: Scaling factor
param.help: Use scale*mfe as an estimate for the ensemble free energy.

param.label: Take G Quadruplex formation into account

tool.help:
**RNAcofold**
Calculates minimum free energy secondary structures of two RNA sequences and their dimers.
-----
**Input format**
RNAcofold requires one FASTA file. Two different RNA sequences can be specified concatenated with the '&' character. The folding of the two sequences with each other will be calculated.
-----
**Outputs**
- Energies of the RNA sequences and the dimers - Structure images - Dot plot matrix images (if partition function is calculated)
